recent_excerpts: Kaspersky discovered 22 malicious iOS apps on the official App Store impersonating crypto wallets like MetaMask and Coinbase, stealing seed phrases and private keys from over 1,000 victims.
Microsoft's April 2026 Patch Tuesday adds a critical warning dialog to Windows Remote Desktop, blocking threat actors from using malicious .rdp files to steal credentials via phishing.
A malicious Ledger Live app distributed via Apple's official App Store for macOS stole approximately $9.5 million from 50 victims by harvesting recovery phrases.
